title: dinebra polycarpha
intro: Dinebra polycarpha, also known as Devil's Claw or Harpagophytum procumbens, is a perennial plant native to southern Africa. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its iridoid glycosides, which have anti-inflammatory and pain-relieving effects. The health benefits of Dinebra polycarpha include reducing joint pain and inflammation, alleviating headaches and migraines, and improving sleep quality. Herbal preparations of Dinebra polycarpha can be found in capsule, tablet, or tea form, and are often used to support joint health and relieve musculoskeletal pain.
